channel.title: JIRA on Gary's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in JIRA on Gary's Blog

item.title: CRGenerator: automating Change Request documentation from git history
item.author: sec.gary@gmail.com (GaryZhu)
item.description:
The problem

Most regulated software environments require a Change Request before any production deployment. The CR needs a list of every JIRA issue included in the release — what changed, why, and who approved it.
